title: Indeed Jobs Scraper ($0.30/1k results)
description: Search Indeed job listings by keyword, location, country, and filters.

query.title: Job Search Query
query.description: Search keywords, for example software engineer, nurse, or marketing manager. Empty input defaults to a narrow US example query.

location.title: Location
location.description: City, state, region, or remote location, for example New York, San Francisco, CA, Berlin, or remote.

country.title: Country
country.description: Two-letter country code supported by Indeed, for example US, GB, CA, AU, DE, or FR.

radius.title: Search Radius
radius.description: Search radius from the provided location. Scrappa accepts 0 to 100.

radius_unit.title: Radius Unit
radius_unit.description: Unit used for the search radius.

limit.title: Results Per Page
limit.description: Number of jobs to return in one request. Scrappa accepts 1 to 100.

cursor.title: Pagination Cursor
cursor.description: Cursor returned as data.pagination.next_cursor by a previous response.

hl.title: Interface Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code for localization, for example en, de, fr, or es.

gl.title: Geolocation Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code for geolocation/localization, for example US, DE, GB, or FR.
